title: Pre-populate Borrow page with sample items for prototype presentation

requirements.text: Pre-populate the backend with a set of realistic sample items across multiple categories for the prototype presentation. Include at least 20 items spanning: Textbooks (e.g., Engineering Drawing, DBMS, Circuit Theory, Data Structures, C Programming), Calculators (e.g., Casio FX-991ES Plus, Texas Instruments TI-84, Classwiz FX-570), Sports Utilities (e.g., Cricket Bat, Football, Badminton Racket, Shuttle Cocks, Volleyball), Lab Coats (e.g., White Lab Coat Size M, White Lab Coat Size L), DSLRs/Electronics (e.g., Nikon D3500 DSLR, Tripod Stand, USB Hub), and Hostel Essentials (e.g., Study Lamp, Extension Board, Electric Kettle). Each item must have: a realistic name, a short description, an appropriate category matching the existing category list, a per-day price in ₹ (within ₹5–₹50 range), an optional per-month price, a hostel-based location string (e.g., 'Hostel B, Room 204', 'Hostel A, Block 3'), and a plausible owner display name. These items should be seeded as initial/demo data accessible without authentication on the Borrow page.

quotes: For borrowing I need items for example textbooks, calculators , sports utilities etc

I'll pre-populate the Borrow page with a rich set of sample items across categories — Textbooks (Engineering Drawing, DBMS, Circuits, etc.), Calculators (Casio FX-991ES, scientific models), Sports Utilities (cricket bat, football, badminton racket, shuttle cocks), plus Lab Coats, DSLRs, and Hostel Essentials — each with realistic ₹ pricing, owner names, and hostel-based locations for your prototype presentation.

acceptanceCriteria: At least 20 sample items are visible on the Borrow page without requiring login
Items span at least 6 categories: Textbooks, Calculators, Sports, Lab Coat, Electronics/DSLR, Hostel Essentials
Every sample item displays a ₹ per-day price within the ₹5–₹50 range
Every sample item shows a hostel-based location string (e.g., 'Hostel B, Room 204')
Every sample item has a plausible owner display name
Items are searchable and filterable by category on the Borrow page
Sample data loads immediately on the Borrow page for the prototype demo without needing any manual data entry

constraints: All prices must be in Indian Rupees (₹), within the ₹5–₹50/day student-friendly range
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Do not break existing backend features: profile management, borrow requests, lost & found, QR code
nonGoals: Adding new pages or UI sections beyond the existing Borrow page
Changing the app's visual theme or color palette
Adding payment processing or real transaction flows
Adding real user accounts or actual student data
